name: Chicken Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: black pepper - freshly ground, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except butter in a saucepan.
2. Whisk well and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
3. Remove from heat and whisk in the butter.
4. Let the sauce cool to room temperature or refrigerate until ready to use.
Makes 2 cups
"Chesapeake Bay Cooking with John Shields" tv recipes, www.johnshields.com
